top_signals.title: EU defence chief urges states to stop making ‘haute couture’ missiles
top_signals.summary: Andrius Kubilius pushes for governments to open weapons stockpiles to Ukraine
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Launches Crackdown on Cross-Border Stock Trading
top_signals.summary: China has launched an unprecedented campaign against illegal cross-border trading to stem capital outflows, threatening severe penalties against popular brokers and ordering non-compliant accounts to be liquidated within two years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HMT workforce management information: April 2026
top_signals.summary: This document details monthly management information on staff numbers and paybill costs within HM Treasury and its agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Americans Are About to Pay Even More at the Grocery Store
top_signals.summary: As Americans confront a surge in prices at the pump, another inflation wave is headed for the grocery store.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: South Korea Aims to Launch First Nuclear Submarine by the Mid-2030s
top_signals.summary: South Korea will seek to launch its first nuclear-powered submarine by the mid-2030s, under a new program aimed at countering North Korea's submarine-launched nuclear and missile threats, officials said on Tuesday.Seoul has long sought to join…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How AI threatens the giants of consulting
top_signals.summary: The technology opens the door for smaller, well-funded challengers to take market share from the Big Four and others
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: A central banker’s perspective on climate change and nature degradation
DARPA launches search for robot medics to treat battlefield casualties
top_signals.summary: DARPA envisions a future where "medicbots" link up to drag wounded personnel to safety, inject lifesaving drugs and form splits around broken limbs.

top_signals.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
top_signals.summary: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for use in a series of massive distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks over the past six months. KrebsOnSecurity publicly named the suspect in February 2026 after the accused launched a volley of DDoS, doxing and swatting campaigns against this author and a security researcher. He now faces criminal hacking charges in both Canada and the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
